main_scope: Raw TomTom FCD audit, missingness, point coverage, continuity, quality groups
main_conclusion: The 1h panel is sufficiently covered for forecasting; 7-day horizon should be stress-test rather than main task.

main_scope: Leakage-free chronological windows for 24h/72h/168h histories and multiple horizons
main_conclusion: Leakage-free window index and train/validation/test split were constructed for main horizons.

main_scope: Persistence, HistoricalAverage, SeasonalHistoricalAverage, Ridge baselines for speed
main_conclusion: SeasonalHistoricalAverage is a strong periodic baseline and the main comparator.

main_scope: Small LSTM/TCN smoke test for data pipeline, shapes, logging and checkpoints
main_conclusion: Deep learning pipeline, validation loop, logging and checkpoint saving were verified; smoke-test accuracy was not used as final evidence.

main_scope: TCN and LSTM with 24h history across 1h, 3h, 6h, 12h, 24h horizons
main_conclusion: Deep models improve over the strong seasonal baseline at 1h, 3h and 6h, but not at 12h or 24h.

main_scope: TCN ablation over speed, time, reliability, volatility and full feature groups
main_conclusion: Speed-only is strongest overall; reliability indicators are more useful for diagnosis than direct accuracy gains in this high-coverage dataset.

main_scope: TCN speed-only with 24h, 72h and 168h histories for 1h, 3h and 6h horizons
main_conclusion: Best history is horizon-dependent: 72h for 1h, 168h for 3h, and 24h for 6h.

main_scope: Evaluation-only robustness diagnostics for Phase 7 best checkpoints
main_conclusion: High volatility is the dominant difficult-sample source; noise and missingness cause gradual degradation.

main_scope: Five-seed TCN speed-only stability for 1h, 3h and 6h best history settings
main_conclusion: Five-seed summary is used when available; all five seeds outperform SeasonalHistoricalAverage only where the summary flag is true.

main_scope: METR-LA-mini five-seed TCN speed-only supplementary public benchmark sanity check
main_conclusion: The TCN speed-only pipeline completed on METR-LA-mini with five seeds; it outperforms HistoricalAverage but not Persistence, so it supports pipeline portability rather than benchmark superiority.
